---
title: "GSE224867 DLBCL Doxorubicin RNA-seq Report"
output: html_document
---

## Overview

This report summarizes the current analysis outputs.

## Differential Expression Table

```{r}
de_file <- "results/tables/de_limma_results.csv"
if (file.exists(de_file)) {
  de <- read.csv(de_file)
  print(utils::head(de, 10))
  cat("Rows:", nrow(de), "\n")
} else {
  cat("No DE results found. Run `make de` first.\n")
}
```
